title: Project: TitanSlayer
description: Slaughter Mobs and Bosses in a Doom Style
body:
### WIP!

Project: TitanSlayer incorporates elements of Doom and Titanfall 2 that the player can utilize to kill mobs.

Contains:
- Super Shotgun
- Rifle
- Goreburst (Plasma Rifle)
  
Features:
- Sliding
- Double Jumping
- Wallrunning
- Walljumping
